---
title: "Phase III Superiority Trials"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Phase III Superiority Trials}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(ggpower)
```

Superiority trials test whether the new treatment is better than control.

## Continuous endpoint (one-sided)

```{r cont}
power_compute(
  "rct_superiority_continuous",
  analysis = "post_hoc",
  d = 0.4,
  alpha = 0.025,
  n1 = 120,
  n2 = 120
)
```

## Binary endpoint

```{r binary}
power_compute(
  "rct_superiority_binary",
  analysis = "a_priori",
  p0 = 0.3,
  p1 = 0.45,
  alpha = 0.025,
  power = 0.9,
  n1 = 50,
  n2 = 50
)
```

## Multi-arm superiority (ANOVA wrapper)

```{r multi}
power_compute("multi_arm_superiority", "a_priori", f = 0.25, groups = 3,
              alpha = 0.05, power = 0.8)
```

## Related

- [Non-inferiority](pharma-non-inferiority.html)
- [Survival endpoints](pharma-survival-endpoints.html)
